hero.formula: WIN Price = Total USDT in Reserve / Total Circulating WIN
hero.buyingDesc: Every buy adds USDT to the Reserve to mint WIN. Thanks to the deflationary burn, the Reserve value grows faster than the new token supply, mathematically forcing the price higher.
hero.sellingTitle: Selling Also Drives the Price Up
hero.sellingDesc: Sells remove WIN from circulation permanently while returning USDT from the Reserve. The Reserve stays robust, and the supply shrinks, creating upward pressure on price.
hero.swappingDesc: After launch, every swap on WinSwap burns a small % of WIN, shrinking supply and making remaining tokens more valuable.
hero.detailed1_1: AlwaysWin is a DeFi protocol designed to make crypto value grow in a more predictable way.
hero.detailed1_2: Instead of relying on hype or market timing, it uses immutable on-chain rules to steadily increase WIN's price floor with every transaction.
hero.detailed2_1: WIN is backed by a growing USDT reserve, and every interaction with the protocol through buying, selling, or using ecosystem apps automatically burns tokens.
hero.detailed2_2: This permanent reduction in supply continuously improves the Reserve Ratio, ensuring each remaining WIN is backed by more USDT, which mathematically pushes the price floor higher.
hero.detailed3_1: Rather than pitting users against each other, AlwaysWin aligns everyone around the same outcome: long-term value growth.
hero.detailed3_2: Every action strengthens the system, and every participant benefits from its upward design.

whyWorks.title: Why AlwaysWin Works
whyWorks.subtitle: Built on clear math, transparent incentives, and a structure designed to keep value rising for every participant
whyWorks.priceUpDesc: WIN's value increases mathematically with every buy and every sell. A permanently shrinking supply and a growing USDT reserve ensure sustained appreciation.
whyWorks.backedDesc: Each WIN token is always backed by real USDT stored in the protocol's reserve. No dilution, no external liquidity providers, no hidden counterparty risks.
whyWorks.alignedDesc: We are aligning your interests with those of all other participants in the market. We are saying goodbye to the predatory 'Zero-Sum Game' (where one wins only if another loses).

valueGrowth.title: AlwaysWin makes WIN grow in value by design.
valueGrowth.description: Every buy, sell, or app interaction burns some WIN, reducing supply while the USDT reserve stays strong. With fewer tokens and a stable reserve, the price floor keeps rising automatically.

protocolJourney.title: Our Protocol Journey
protocolJourney.subtitle: From early participation to full ecosystem utility, each phase strengthens the reserve and pushes the price floor higher.

getInEarly.title: Get In Early. Win From Day One.
getInEarly.description: Enter the Pre-IDO phase to acquire WIN before the reserve grows and the price advances to its next level.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Looking for more answers? Explore our full FAQ for detailed explanations.
faq.a1: The mathematical formula P = R/C ensures price growth as the reserve (R) increases and circulating supply (C) decreases with every transaction.
faq.q2: How is it possible that the WIN price in WinSwap doesn't drop?
faq.a2: WinSwap's bonding curve and burn mechanism ensure the price can only go up. Every transaction burns tokens while maintaining reserve stability.
faq.q3: What is the Raffle-IDO, and what can I win?
faq.a3: The Raffle-IDO is a fair price discovery mechanism where participants can win bonus WIN tokens and exclusive rewards.
faq.q4: What is the tokenomics of WIN?
faq.a4: WIN tokenomics is built on a deflationary model where every transaction burns a percentage of the supply, while maintaining a 100% USDT reserve backing.
faq.a5: The Pre-IDO phase ends once the initial allocation is fully subscribed or when the countdown reaches zero, transitioning the protocol to the Raffle-IDO stage.
